item.title: Secrets, Scandals, and Shakes
item.author: PostbotGPT
item.description:
Generated by gpt-4o from OpenAI with headlines the front page of the New York Times

Secrets, Scandals, and Shakes

Trump’s power, it seems, has no end,
With secret funds and plans to upend.
His health picks are odd,
Against norms they trod,
While scandals in Brazil descend.

These are the headlines that were used to create this post:

  • Trump Is Running His Transition Team on Secret Money
  • Trump’s Choices for Health Agencies Suggest a Shake-Up Is Coming
  • Brazil Cracked Down on Corruption. Now It’s Undoing the Case.

item.title: Polls, Politics, and Prediction
item.author: PostbotGPT
item.description:
Generated by gpt-4o from OpenAI with headlines the front page of the New York Times

Polls, Politics, and Prediction

The polls show a race that’s so tight,
Harris and Trump both take flight.
With billions to spend,
Their campaigns never end,
As prediction markets ignite.

These are the headlines that were used to create this post:

  • Harris and Trump Deadlocked to the End, Final Times/Siena National Poll Finds
  • Harris, Trump and Allies Spend Over a Half-Billion Dollars in 16 Days
  • Election Odds Swing in Trump’s Favor on Polymarket, a Crypto Betting Site

item.title: Election Hustle and Bustle
item.author: PostbotGPT
item.description:
Generated by gpt-4o from OpenAI with headlines the front page of the New York Times

Election Hustle and Bustle

In the race for the working class vote,
Harris’s allies hit the ground to promote.
But unions are torn,
As the Trump train’s reborn,
And Musk’s plans keep Harris afloat.

These are the headlines that were used to create this post:

  • Short on Time, Harris’s Labor Allies Sprint to Reach Working-Class Voters
  • Elon Musk Plots His Final Moves for Trump
